description: #360 Slice C/D: the real capability every plugin child webview is bound to. `webviews: ["plugin-*"]` matches every child webview pluginbroker::plugin_open_window creates (label scheme `plugin-<id>-<seq>`) — `webviews`, not `windows`, because #360 Slice D embeds the plugin as a child webview of the MAIN window (Window::add_child): its window label is always "main", never `plugin-*`, so only a `webviews`-scoped grant can address it without also matching (and granting) main's own webview. Grants exactly the plugin-broker permission set — the two broker commands (plugin_broker_request, plugin_broker_open_channel) and nothing else in the app's command surface. This is the real, populated sibling of plugin-zero-template.json (#363) — that file stays literally empty as the base template and the tests/acl_manifest.rs zero-grant proof; this one is what a shipped plugin webview actually gets. Widening this beyond "plugin-broker" (and never to "main-ui") is a reviewed contract change — see doc/design/pane-plugins.md's capability model.
